_comment: PoE Metamorph catalyst types. Catalysts add quality to specific modifier categories on jewellery and belts.
how_it_works: Use a Catalyst on a ring, amulet, or belt. Quality adds up to 20% increased effect to matching modifier categories. Catalysts are harvested from Metamorph organs — collect 5 of the same type. Different organ families drop different catalyst types.
max_quality_note: Quality caps at 20%. Higher quality increases numeric values on matching mods (e.g. +30 life with 20% quality becomes +36 life).

catalysts.name: Abrasive Catalyst
catalysts.examples: Attack speed, melee damage, attack damage, local attack modifiers
catalysts.best_for: Attack builds using rings/amulets with attack damage or speed
catalysts.organ_source: Monsters with strong physical attacks (e.g. Tora, Wolf packs, melee rares)

catalysts.name: Imbued Catalyst
catalysts.examples: Spell damage, cast speed, spell crit, minion damage
catalysts.organ_source: Spellcasting monsters (e.g. Doedre, Maligaro, caster rares)

catalysts.name: Turbulent Catalyst
catalysts.examples: Fire/cold/lightning damage, elemental damage with attacks
catalysts.organ_source: Elemental monsters (e.g. Piety, Merveil, elemental rares)

catalysts.name: Prismatic Catalyst
catalysts.examples: Fire res, cold res, lightning res, chaos res, all res

catalysts.name: Fertile Catalyst
catalysts.examples: Maximum life, maximum mana, life regeneration, mana regeneration
catalysts.organ_source: Tanky/life-heavy monsters (e.g. Brutus, Gravicius, life-regen rares)

catalysts.name: Tempering Catalyst
catalysts.examples: Armour, evasion rating, energy shield (local), hybrid defences
catalysts.best_for: Defence builds using rings with armour/evasion/ES
catalysts.organ_source: Armoured monsters (e.g. Goatmen, heavily armoured rares)

catalysts.name: Intrinsic Catalyst
catalysts.best_for: Meeting attribute requirements or attribute-stacking builds

catalysts.name: Unstable Catalyst
catalysts.examples: Critical strike chance, critical strike multiplier
catalysts.best_for: Crit builds (great for amulet anointment + crit mods)
catalysts.organ_source: Crit-heavy monsters (e.g. assassin-type rares, sniper monsters)

catalysts.name: Noxious Catalyst
catalysts.examples: Physical damage, chaos damage, physical damage over time, bleed

catalysts.name: Accelerating Catalyst
catalysts.examples: Attack speed, cast speed, movement speed, cooldown recovery
catalysts.best_for: Speed-focused builds — movement speed belt is the classic use
catalysts.organ_source: Fast/mobile monsters (e.g. Quill Rain mobs, speedy rares)

catalysts.name: Catalytic Catalyst
catalysts.examples: Chance to ignite, freeze, shock; elemental ailment duration; ailment damage
catalysts.best_for: Ignite, freeze, or shock prolif builds

catalysts.name: Veiled Catalyst
catalysts.examples: Spell damage, cooldown recovery rate, mana cost reduction
catalysts.best_for: Builds using unveiled ring/amulet mods from Jun crafting

tips: Catalysts apply to the item's base quality budget — a 20-quality item uses up all quality. Always apply catalysts before other quality sources.
Catalysts only affect explicit modifiers of the matching type. Implicits, enchantments, and anointments are never improved.
Switching catalyst type resets quality to 0. Choose carefully before applying.
The 5-organ threshold to get one catalyst is fixed — collect 5 matching organs from Metamorph encounters.
Accelerating Catalyst on a Stygian Vise with movement speed is one of the most traded catalyst uses in the game.
